heading: Step 3: Compile and run the file to create the collection.
body:
Compile and run your application in your IDE or your shell.

**Input:**

```shell
kotlinc FileName.kt -include-runtime -d FileName.jar
java -jar FileName.jar
```

**Output:**

```
Schools collection successfully created and populated.
```

codeBlocks.content: Schools collection successfully created and populated.
